prompt: Two references are attached: a PHOTO of the actual dish, and a vintage voucher whose food illustration shows the ENGRAVING STYLE to use. Draw the dish from the photo as a hand-tinted chromolithograph spot illustration in that engraving style, in NATURAL true-to-life colors: two open-faced folded bao buns in soft ivory-white steamed dough, seasoned meat filling in rich natural browns, unmistakably fresh green cilantro sprigs, a whisper of pale cucumber. Isolated subject on a fully TRANSPARENT background - nothing else at all. No yellow or gold color cast; colors natural and true. No border, no frame, no text, no background, no shadow. Subject fills about 70% of the frame. Warm ochre-sepia engraved linework with natural hand-tinted flat color washes. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
